file_name: ServiceNow - Veza - third party questionnaire - 23 December 2025.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if ServiceNow and Veza are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with ServiceNow and/or Veza.
